title: Craftable elytras
description: It makes elytras... Well, craftable, didn't you read the name?
body:
This datapack makes elytras craftable, you should be able to see the crafting recipe in-game but incase you can't, this is the recipe:
![Elytra crafting recipe ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/507db638c84487cc0ecd58313c34cbc3ad8b531c.jpeg)
